sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109002" key="u(poproti/qhmi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποπροτίθημι</orth>, <sense id="n109002.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">push forward under,</tr_> [<cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θύραν] κλίμακι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:36:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aen.Tact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">36.2</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
